Bash(/opt/homebrew/Caskroom/miniforge/base/envs/du/bin/python -c "
import yaml
from pathlib import Path

# Verify detection YAML parses and has fallback_keywords
with open\(''prompts/document_type_detection.yaml''\) as f:
    det = yaml.safe_load\(f\)
print\(''Detection YAML keys:'', list\(det.keys\(\)\)\)
print\(''Fallback keywords:'', list\(det.get\(''fallback_keywords'', {}\).keys\(\)\)\)

# Verify extraction YAML parses and we can derive types
with open\(''prompts/internvl3_prompts.yaml''\) as f:
    ext = yaml.safe_load\(f\)
prompt_keys = set\(ext.get\(''prompts'', {}\).keys\(\)\)
non_doc = {''universal'', ''settings''}
doc_keys = prompt_keys - non_doc
canonical = set\(\)
for k in doc_keys:
    c = k.upper\(\).replace\(''_FLAT'', ''''\).replace\(''_DATE_GROUPED'', ''''\)
    canonical.add\(c\)
print\(''Extraction prompt keys:'', sorted\(doc_keys\)\)
print\(''Canonical types derived:'', sorted\(canonical\)\)

# Verify field definitions
with open\(''config/field_definitions.yaml''\) as f:
    fd = yaml.safe_load\(f\)
doc_fields = {k for k in fd.get\(''document_fields'', {}\) if k != ''universal''}
print\(''Field def types:'', sorted\(doc_fields\)\)

# Check alignment
print\(\)
missing_prompts = doc_fields - {c.lower\(\) for c in canonical}
missing_fields = {c.lower\(\) for c in canonical} - doc_fields
if missing_prompts:
    print\(f''WARNING: Types in field_definitions but no extraction prompt: {missing_prompts}''\)
if missing_fields:
    print\(f''WARNING: Types with extraction prompt but no field definition: {missing_fields}''\)
if not missing_prompts and not missing_fields:
    print\(''All document types aligned between field_definitions and extraction prompts''\)
")
